destructive.name: delete_tautologies
cases: DELETE FROM users WHERE 1=1;
DELETE FROM users WHERE true;
DELETE FROM users WHERE (1 = 1);
DELETE FROM users WHERE 1 IS NOT NULL;
DELETE FROM sessions WHERE true OR user_id = 42;
DELETE FROM audit_events WHERE (true) OR created_at < now();
DELETE FROM orders WHERE (1=1) AND (true);
WITH doomed AS (SELECT id FROM users) DELETE FROM users USING doomed WHERE 1=1;
DELETE FROM public.users WHERE TRUE;
DELETE FROM accounts WHERE ((1 = 1));
DELETE FROM login_events WHERE 1=1 RETURNING id;
DELETE FROM billing_events WHERE true ORDER BY id;

destructive.name: update_tautologies
cases: UPDATE accounts SET balance = 0 WHERE 1=1;
UPDATE users SET admin = true WHERE true;
UPDATE orders SET status = 'paid' WHERE (1 = 1);
UPDATE sessions SET revoked = true WHERE true OR id = 10;
UPDATE public.accounts SET tier = 'free' WHERE 1 IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE invoices SET amount = 0 WHERE ((1=1));
WITH target AS (SELECT id FROM users) UPDATE users SET disabled = true FROM target WHERE true;
UPDATE customers SET email = lower(email) WHERE 1=1 RETURNING id;
UPDATE ledger SET posted = false WHERE true AND 1=1;
UPDATE feature_flags SET enabled = true WHERE (true);

destructive.name: drop_truncate_ddl
cases: DROP TABLE users;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS audit_events;
DROP TABLE public.orders CASCADE;
DROP DATABASE customer_prod;
TRUNCATE users;
TRUNCATE TABLE audit_events;
TRUNCATE public.sessions RESTART IDENTITY;
DROP TABLE "Users";
DROP TABLE `users`;
DROP INDEX users_email_idx;
REINDEX TABLE users;
ALTER TABLE accounts DETACH PARTITION accounts_2025;

destructive.name: risky_alter_table
cases: ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN email;
ALTER TABLE accounts DROP CONSTRAINT accounts_user_id_fkey;
ALTER TABLE orders RENAME COLUMN total TO amount;
ALTER TABLE events ALTER COLUMN payload TYPE jsonb;
ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN email SET DATA TYPE text;
ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN email SET NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN email DROP NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN public_id uuid NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN token text NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid();
ALTER TABLE orders ADD CONSTRAINT orders_user_fk FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id);
ALTER TABLE users ADD CONSTRAINT users_email_unique UNIQUE (email);
ALTER TABLE accounts ADD PRIMARY KEY (id);
ALTER TABLE users ADD CHECK (length(email) > 3);
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN created_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT clock_timestamp();
ALTER TABLE events ALTER COLUMN created_at TYPE timestamptz;

destructive.name: locking_indexes
cases: CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users(email);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_orders_ref ON orders(reference);
BEGIN; CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_users_name ON users(name); COMMIT;
START TRANSACTION; CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_events_kind ON events(kind); COMMIT;
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_created_at ON accounts(created_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_user_id ON sessions(user_id);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_customers_slug ON customers(slug);
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_events_created_at ON audit_events(created_at);

destructive.name: bulk_dml
cases: WITH doomed AS (SELECT id FROM users) DELETE FROM users USING doomed;
WITH target AS (SELECT id FROM accounts) UPDATE accounts SET disabled = true FROM target;
WITH scoped AS (SELECT id FROM users WHERE disabled) DELETE FROM users USING scoped WHERE users.id = scoped.id;
WITH scoped AS (SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE tier = 'free') UPDATE accounts SET archived = true FROM scoped WHERE accounts.id = scoped.id;
MERGE INTO users USING incoming_users ON users.id = incoming_users.id WHEN MATCHED THEN DELETE;
MERGE INTO accounts USING incoming_accounts ON accounts.id = incoming_accounts.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET status = 'closed';
INSERT INTO audit_archive SELECT * FROM audit_events;
INSERT INTO users_archive SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL;
WITH moved AS (DELETE FROM events RETURNING *) INSERT INTO events_archive SELECT * FROM moved;
WITH copied AS (SELECT * FROM orders) INSERT INTO orders_archive SELECT * FROM copied;

destructive.name: mysql_exec_comments
cases: /*! DROP TABLE users */;
/*!50000 DROP TABLE accounts */;
/*! TRUNCATE TABLE sessions */;
/*! ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN email */;
/*! DELETE FROM users WHERE 1=1 */;
/*! UPDATE accounts SET balance = 0 WHERE 1=1 */;

destructive.name: orm_unanalyzable
cases:
class DropUsers < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.1]
  def change
    drop_table :users
  end
end
class RemoveEmail < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.1]
  def change
    remove_column :users, :email
  end
end
class RewriteAccounts < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.1]
  def up
    execute "UPDATE accounts SET balance = 0"
  end
end
class AddNotNull < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.1]
  def change
    add_column :users, :slug, :string, null: false
  end
end
class CreateDangerousIndex < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.1]
  def change
    add_index :users, :email
  end
end
class DropAudit < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.1]
  def change
    execute 'DROP TABLE audit_events'
  end
end
class TruncateSessions < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.1]
  def change
    execute 'TRUNCATE sessions'
  end
end
class BackfillAll < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.1]
  def change
    execute 'DELETE FROM sessions WHERE 1=1'
  end
end
class RenameColumn < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.1]
  def change
    rename_column :users, :email, :contact
  end
end
class DropConstraint < ActiveRecord::Migration[7.1]
  def change
    execute 'ALTER TABLE orders DROP CONSTRAINT orders_user_id_fkey'
  end
end

destructive.name: alembic_unanalyzable
quoted_and_dollar_edge_destructive
cases: DROP TABLE "user";
TRUNCATE "audit_events";
DELETE FROM "users" WHERE 1=1;
UPDATE "accounts" SET "balance" = 0 WHERE true;
SELECT $fn$ not executed DROP TABLE users $fn$; DROP TABLE sessions;
INSERT INTO audit(msg) VALUES ($q$DELETE FROM users WHERE 1=1$q$); DELETE FROM users;
ALTER TABLE "Orders" DROP COLUMN "legacyCode";
CREATE INDEX "idx_users_email" ON "users"("email");
ALTER TABLE "users" ADD COLUMN "slug" text NOT NULL;
DROP INDEX "idx_old_users_email";

safe.name: literal_and_comment_noops
cases: INSERT INTO audit(msg) VALUES ('DROP TABLE users');
UPDATE notes SET body = 'TRUNCATE sessions' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT $tag$ DELETE FROM users WHERE 1=1 $tag$;

-- DROP TABLE users
SELECT 1;
/* TRUNCATE audit_events */ SELECT 1;
INSERT INTO audit(msg) VALUES ('UPDATE users SET admin=true WHERE 1=1');
SELECT 'DROP TABLE x', "DROP TABLE" FROM t WHERE id = 1;
INSERT INTO logs(message) VALUES ($$ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN email$$);
UPDATE comments SET body = 'CREATE INDEX idx ON users(email)' WHERE id = 7;
SELECT '/*! DROP TABLE users */';
/* nested /* DROP TABLE users */ comment */ SELECT 1;
INSERT INTO audit(msg) VALUES ('MERGE INTO users WHEN MATCHED THEN DELETE');

safe.name: bounded_dml
cases: DELETE FROM orders WHERE id = 42;
DELETE FROM sessions WHERE created_at < now() - interval '30 days';
DELETE FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM expired_users WHERE tenant_id = 1);
DELETE FROM audit_events WHERE tenant_id = 7 AND created_at < now();
UPDATE users SET seen = true WHERE id = 42;
UPDATE accounts SET touched = true WHERE 1=1 AND id = 42;
UPDATE orders SET status = 'archived' WHERE tenant_id = 7;
UPDATE sessions SET revoked = true WHERE user_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE disabled);
DELETE FROM users WHERE true AND id = 42;
UPDATE users SET name = lower(name) WHERE true AND id = 42;
DELETE FROM events WHERE id = ANY($1);
UPDATE invoices SET exported = true WHERE exported = false AND tenant_id = 9;

safe.name: concurrent_indexes
cases: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_users_email ON users(email);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_ref ON orders(reference);
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_user ON sessions(user_id);
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_events_created_at ON events(created_at);
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_accounts_status ON accounts(status);
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_audit_kind ON audit_events(kind);
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_customers_org ON customers(org_id);
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_payments_created_at ON payments(created_at);
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_users_lower_email ON users(lower(email));
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_tenant_created ON orders(tenant_id, created_at);

safe.name: new_table_index
cases: CREATE TABLE users_tmp (id bigint); CREATE INDEX idx_users_tmp_id ON users_tmp(id);
CREATE TABLE "BookingSeat" ("id" text primary key, "referenceUid" text); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "BookingSeat_referenceUid_key" ON "BookingSeat"("referenceUid");
CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_backfill (id bigint); CREATE INDEX idx_tmp_backfill_id ON tmp_backfill(id);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_archive (id bigint, created_at timestamptz); CREATE INDEX idx_audit_archive_created_at ON audit_archive(created_at);
CREATE UNLOGGED TABLE staging_users (id bigint); CREATE INDEX idx_staging_users_id ON staging_users(id);
CREATE TABLE public.new_events (id bigint, kind text); CREATE INDEX idx_new_events_kind ON public.new_events(kind);
CREATE TABLE reports (id bigint primary key); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_reports_id ON reports(id);
CREATE TABLE imports (id bigint, tenant_id bigint); CREATE INDEX idx_imports_tenant_id ON imports(tenant_id);
CREATE TABLE temp_orders (id bigint, ref text); CREATE INDEX idx_temp_orders_ref ON temp_orders(ref);
CREATE TABLE metrics_daily (day date, value bigint); CREATE INDEX idx_metrics_daily_day ON metrics_daily(day);

safe.name: temporary_table_cleanup
cases: CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_users (id bigint); DROP TABLE tmp_users;
CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_sessions (id bigint); TRUNCATE tmp_sessions;
CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_orders (id bigint); TRUNCATE TABLE tmp_orders; DROP TABLE tmp_orders;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE tmp_backfill (id bigint); DROP TABLE tmp_backfill;
CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_audit (id bigint); DELETE FROM tmp_audit WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_events (id bigint); UPDATE tmp_events SET id = id WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_metrics (id bigint); CREATE INDEX idx_tmp_metrics_id ON tmp_metrics(id);
CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_copy (id bigint); INSERT INTO tmp_copy VALUES (1);

safe.name: safe_alter_table
cases: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN nickname text;
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN created_by bigint DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE users ADD CONSTRAINT users_email_check CHECK (email <> '') NOT VALID;
ALTER TABLE orders ADD CONSTRAINT orders_user_fk FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) NOT VALID;
ALTER TABLE accounts ADD COLUMN metadata jsonb DEFAULT '{}';
ALTER TABLE events ADD COLUMN processed_at timestamptz;
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN active boolean DEFAULT true;
ALTER TABLE invoices ADD COLUMN exported boolean DEFAULT false;
ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN last_seen_at timestamptz;
ALTER TABLE audit_events ADD COLUMN actor_id bigint;
ALTER TABLE customers ADD COLUMN country text DEFAULT 'unknown';
ALTER TABLE feature_flags ADD COLUMN rollout_percent integer DEFAULT 0;

safe.name: misc_safe_sql
cases: SELECT 1;
INSERT INTO audit_log(id, msg) VALUES (1, 'ok');
INSERT INTO audit_log(msg) VALUES ('ok'), ('still ok');
CREATE VIEW active_users AS SELECT id FROM users WHERE active = true;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW user_counts AS SELECT tenant_id, count(*) FROM users GROUP BY tenant_id;
ANALYZE users;
VACUUM ANALYZE users;
SET lock_timeout = '5s'; SET statement_timeout = '30s';
COMMENT ON TABLE users IS 'customer users';
GRANT SELECT ON users TO readonly;

safe.name: mysql_safe_exec_comments
cases: /*! SET sql_mode = 'STRICT_ALL_TABLES' */;
/*!40101 SET character_set_client = utf8 */;
/*! CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_log (id bigint) */;
/*! INSERT INTO audit_log(id) VALUES (1) */;
/*! SELECT 1 */;
